Competitive prices, friendly and helpful staff. Very keen on local foods and produce. This store is a rare gem.
Great good, stylish decor, top-notch speed-of-service.
cultural:
This is one of Philadelphia's true hidden gems. This preserved area is a fantastic place to take children, or just to get out, take a walk and admire.
I am a member and it makes me feel good about contributing.

First visit was exceptional.  Very nicely decorated, very comfortable, very friendly staff.  Food was an interesting mix of really nicely prepared and presented foods...very global perspective!  Everything about TradeWinds was outstanding and we will return asap.  It's a BYOB, btw.  Loved the eve...

How have I never been here before?! This old stone mansion was built in the 1900's, and is home to art and artist all from Philadelphia, some even from my own alma mater, (the only all female art school in the country), Moore College Of Art & Design. Shout out to my sisters out there!! 

Woodmere...
Beautiful and well kept arboretum....a gem to visit and memorable....love the long loop walk ... so much to see and just simple serene... a special place for me and will surely revisit

I'm  writing  a  review  about  the Woodmere Art Museum because  it is one of those museums  that continues to  fly under the  radar of Philly art venues  that  doesn't get the attention  it really deserves.  
As I write this  review, Woodmere  is currently  exhibiting the work  of  Jessie Drew B...

artsy:
Truly an artist. They are inclusive, creative, and kind. I gave them some inspiration pictures of the design I wanted shaved onto my head for my wedding. They discussed everything with me, right down to which way the shading would go.

Everything was perfect and I got TONS of compliments. I even ...

We are so happy we decided to book with George Street for our wedding. Not only were they the most affordable company to work with, but their customer service was superb and the pictures were made available to us super quick! We loved doing the style quiz which suggested a few different photograp...

George Street was fantastic from start to finish. We worked with Vlad Gurevich as our photographer and he was incredible.  From the moment he arrived to when he left, I felt comfortable and at ease. He went along with the flow of the day seamlessly, and by the time he left it was felt like he was...

We were very pleased with the package we received (lead photographer, assistant photographer, videographer, engagement photos and upgraded photo album).  The photographers and videographers were incredible, so friendly, professional and amazing creativity with our photos.  We have not yet receive...
very very good authentic hand drawn noodle house.  There's another place like 3 blocks away with a VERY similar name - do not be deceived.  This place is the one you want!
foodie: Not enough words in my Chef vocabulary to describe this place. The flavors and ingredients to choose from was amazing.  Melt in your mouth Wagyu to die for. Staff was amazing! Now my favorite place to eat! I was in Culinary Heaven!
Highly recommend coming to this restaurant! The server is amazing & the food is immaculate! I did the all you can eat hot pot and it was delicious!
This food is amazing. David was our server and he has been very helpful with our orders. I will definitely recommend my friends to come here.

Came him with my hubby for hotpot, they have a great variety of meat and vegetables. I'm impressed!! I'm gonna bring all my friends over in the future for gathering for sure. Definitely recommend it, the sauce bar is great too. Love it. Service was awesome, love our waiter! :)

This place is perfect on a cold or rainy day when you're craving something warm or hot. They have many options from their menu such as hot pot, seafood boil, stir fry, etc so everybody has options whether you're a vegetarian, pescatarian or looking for meat! The establishment was very clean and t...
nightlife: My favorite place to start out the evening or wrap up the night. Service is outstanding and drinks are fantastic!  I really appreciate the atmosphere. I can actually have a conversation without having to yell over the music like so many other places. I highly recommend!

Another great night at Bar-Ly in the books. I love this local sports bar with 60 beers on tap and a great selection of liquor. The service is great! The staff is very friendly. The food menu is great for the late night crowds or just the typical lunch/dinner.  I shall be back again and again and ...
Excellent atmosphere, great happy hour, excellent bar tenders.  Flat screens throughout the bar, plenty of seating.  Highly recommended to have drinks.
awesome bar good happy hour from 10-12 for young adults that ACTUALLY have a job..cheap food but super delicious. D and Jamie were awesome bartenders. such a good time
I love bar-ly always a good time with a pleasant atmosphere and very affordable drinks and food!!
family: Simply AMAZING! Food and service rule!!!! NIce quiet place for a first time get together with a date or relax with friends. Nice clientele and the owners are the best. Very nice family. WIsh them the best!
Great service and great food. Highly recommended for any take out or dine in! The place looks like a family business and looks very well kept. Everyone was so friendly and accommodating. Best wishes!

Awesome family run restaurant. This is not an upscale place but a humble family style restaurant that really pleased me. Very hot and fresh congee, salty and flavorful pork and duck really made for an awesome breakfast. Open at 8AM.

I love this place.  Great food, service, friendly, especially to my baby whenever I bring her.  Not everything on the menu is great or for me, but I try different things here all the time and most of the time it's great, and inexpensive.

Update: Have been here three times in the past year. The food remains outstanding and the price and quantity extremely satisfying to both wallet and stomach!  What I truly appreciate as a parent about this place is they really are good with kids!! Each time they have very graciously accommodate o...
upscale: Super friendly employees and the best ice cream I've ever had. Everything was extremely fresh and prepared carefully to our standards. Restaurant was extremely clean and well kept. Free wifi! Great price for fresh made to order ice cream with unlimited toppings

De. Lish. Fantastic noodles and the scallion pancake was to die for. Can't recommend enough. The service was great. Be aware that you need cash, but they have an ATM machine, so it's fine. Very authentic  and unassuming decor. We even had a large group and they handled it so well!

We stumbled upon this gem while wandering Chinatown on a Saturday afternoon. It can be somewhat overwhelming to figure out which restaurant to choose, but the "Best of Philly 2016" sign on the front door signaled that we were on to something special. The first time we visited Dining Partner and I...
Excellent dim sum and large menu to choose from. Never disappointed with all their food and sauces. The only downfall is the newly initiated corking fee.
Satisfying Malaysian food. Extensive menu, priced reasonably. Love their noodles and roti especially. One of the better Asian restaurants in Philadelphia
cultural: First venue I've ever been to in Philly, and still one of my top favorites. Great architectural detail inside and out.

Stumbled across this place looking for another place. Loved everything about this place. The atmosphere, seating, and mural on the wall, the staff and lastly the desert we amazing. My new fave is the coconut ice cream...heavenly!!!!
Cool art work on the walls. Clean! Plenty of waiters and the nice manager at the front. Food was awesome! A really sweet hole in the wall spot.
Great food and good service. Nice place to break and relax during a trip to the historic quarter.

Red Kings, at this location, completely changed their menu and decor over the last year or so.  Stopped by for lunch and it was great.  It was more like a Chinese Izakaya.  Many small plates and offerings on skewers.  Food was excellent.

Have been using Oil Patch for over 8 years (Glenside, PA.) They have very competitive pricing, 24/7 HUMANS answering the phones, and same day delivery. We have never had a problem or complaint.
Fast and prompt delivery.  The people who answer the phone are nice and professional.  I've never had an issue with their service.

nightlife: Best bar in Fishtown/Kensington. Bill is great. Vegan heaven. Fantastic cocktails. Great ambiance.  Not expensive. Don't pass this place up.

Delicious everything, refreshingly new take on the local food and drink spot. High ceilings, cozy but not stuffy, it's a great place to meet up & chat over drinks.

Alright, so I have to admit that I bartend here 2 days a week, but I LOVE THIS PLACE! Excellent new local pub. More than simple bar snacks. Great beer selection. Food outsourced from local favorites (good spoon, reanimator, Kensington Quarters). Comfortable decor complete with a fireplace. Another great addition to the neighborhood.
family: My favorite place in the neighborhood for all things tasty, warm, refreshing, friendly, and chill. Absolutely kid friendly, absolutely all people friendly. Love this place.
So excited to have this place in the neighborhood. Open super early and very kid friendly. Food is delicious. Highly recommend the freshly fried donuts and breakfast sandwiches are my favorite.

What a great addition to the neighborhood! Friendly atmosphere and staff. Lovely natural light to work in. Delicious coffee and pastries. Excited to spend a lot more time here.
Definitely the best pizza in the neighborhood. The staff is always friendly and the service is quick!
upscale: This place is a little hidden gem near where I live. I've been three times now and everything I have ordered has been so delicious. Great, friendly staff, pretty quick service and a nice little cafe feel. Totally recommend!

Fantastic pho. Some of the best in the country. They don't fool around, the menu is spare so they bring you the highest quality. A very authentic and memorable-warm experience. This is food as art for the soul.

Dan is a friendly guy and he works efficiently and quickly to keep all of the customers satisfied but also engaged. Delicious everything, refreshingly new take on the local food and drink spot. High ceilings, cozy but not stuffy, it's a great place to meet up & chat over drinks.
Great soups, great sandwiches, and great service. Our server Mary was attentive, knowledgeable, and courteous. Always a go to when in the neighborhood.

This place was amazing. The food was delicious. Good service! Friendly! The presentation of the food was exceptional. My favorite entree was the Seasoned Chicken.

Over its long history, the PMA has amassed a deep, diverse collection of the finest and most recognizable art works in history.

Due to pandemic limitations, a reserved/timed ticket is required.
A serendipitous obligation that makes viewing art much more pleasurable because there's fewer visitors...

Incredible collection and loved the rooms with various themes: Japanese tea house, Southeast Asian, Middle Eastern. Impressive and eclectic collection covering several centuries of painting sculpture and textiles.

Took full admission at 4 on Saturday not bothering to tell us they would close in one hour.

Great place to soak in culture. If you love art, this is obviously the place to check out. architecture is stunning. 

I also used to love to run up and down the rocky steps. really does make you feel like a champion at 6 AM.

Great, fresh food made to order. Beautiful environment and decent pricing. Perfect for a quick meal while exploring the area

Very nice museum that is huge and offers so many great statues and public displays of art. I love everything about this place. It was very neat to see all the famous pieces of art. I would highly recommend this to anyone that loves art and appreciates things like this.

Great service, great beer list, great bar food. Under new ownership who has made some positive changes to improve the experience. Great local bar.
family: Just moved in down the street and am so happy for this to be my neighborhood joint! Very friendly, fun staff. Rotating taps of craft beer and the pulled pork sandwich is awesome! Don't miss the fish and chips, either. Absolutely worth stopping by.

Me and my friends come here every time we're in town. This diner has the best coffee to sit and talk over. The food is always fresh & hot and the waitstaff is one of the best around.

Best. Bar. In. The. Neighborhood.

The best in the city. Simple menu, phenomenal food. The decor is so pleasant like you are in another country. The chef/owner/waitress was delightful. This place is legit, has won awards, and deserves praise.

Great new shop- super clean and bright. I bought 5 NY strip steak- very fresh, trim and delicious. You'll pay a premium for sure but I didn't regret it.
cultural: Awesome place. Great quality plants. Knowledgeable staff that does amazing work. Take a look at some of the green walls they've done in the city.

Great experience for a random date night filled with photos. Secluded area in the city. Not much distractions. Right next to Geno's Steaks. Get some food in the mean time afterwards. Make your significant other smile by doing a mini photoshoot of them here! Great art along the walls as well!

Stumbled across this location on social media and I was really excited to check it out. LOVE this place. Vincent does a terrific job, is very timely, and the prices are terrific.

This was one of the best meals I have ever had! Every dish we tried was a delicious combination of flavors I would not have put together. This is my new favorite spot to take friends. Wonderful and consistent sumptuous dishes come out of this kitchen. We had a wonderful night of appetizers and entrees, perfectly seasoned and unique enough to make this restaurant stand out. Top caliber.

Easy going spot where you can get a snack or try the entire menu with some friends. Everything melted in my mouth. The ingredients are classic, yet ingenious. Wonderful, interesting choices.  Tried many!  Delightful chef and staff.  You know you're in good hands from the moment you walk in until the last smidgen of the delicious desserts.
nightlife: The perfect neighborhood bar. The attention to detail is impeccable from the cocktails to the food, everything is spectacular. One of the owners works behind the bar and is a beautiful human. Do not skip on the Mifflin tavern you will surely regret it
Our new neighborhood bar. Great drinks and food. Party of 5, sat outside until 10pm brought it inside and same great service ... plus a visit from Spider-Man. We will be back for sure!

This is the spot.  I may be a bit biased since this is my local bar, but seriously... they have the most amazing beer selection.  They always have good stuff on draft and the happy hour deal can't be beat.  Between 4 and 6, you get half off drafts and food.

This place is great. A nice family run business close by. Friendly staff. Always a good interaction. They even have a few off-menu items that are soooo delicious. The owners oldest grand daughter is a whole snack! 

Aside from that, very enjoyable, family-oriented establishment with a healthy sprinkle of the neighborhoods finest drinkers and bartenders. Gotta love it !

Great neighborhood spot! Love coming here for games. Tons of space so you can hang at the bar or head upstairs for additional seating. Their beer selection is awesome and so is their food! Definitely check out their wings.
This restaurant is really hitting out of the park. It is providing a safe environment while also giving us great food and service !!!
upscale: I love this place. Conscientious, caring business looking out for customers and employees. Amazing experience on our first visit.  Very cool interior design.  Wonderful service.   And everything we ordered was delicious - soup, apps, rolls, nigiri and sashimi.   Wonderful addition to the neighborhood.
Wildly creative dishes that are absolutely mouth-watering, paired with terrific service, and a cozy atmosphere. A neighborhood favorite spot, affordable fare, and a BYOB...you can't get much better.
Don't pass this one by! Quaint, quiet, foodie spot with personality. Premier service and dedication to the craft of providing you with a taste not to be forgotten. We will be back and often!

Industry is one of my favorite neighborhood places. It's truly a breath of fresh air. Great experience, the instructor was awesome. My friend and I went on 3/7 to paint Monet's lillies. Great music, great vibe and laughs and very easy to follow along. Will for sure go again!
foodie: Fresh quality food. Delicious, prepared right in front of you. Customer service AMAZING. The team is very friendly. Will be returning. Compliments to the chefs.

We went in before I could take a good picture, it smelled amazing and tasted very good. I had the signature ramen. Crab Rangoon was also very tasty. Cute, clean restaurant. Self seating, you order at the counter and they give you a little buzzer while they make your food.

My son and I had dinner on the opening night. We were immediately greeted when we walked in. The host was friendly and quickly seated us. Once we were seated the server came to take our order. nightlife: Very chill neighborhood bar. My gf & I had a great time Sunday night! Servers and bartenders are very friendly, especially Gabe, Missy & Tori. The drinks were made perfectly & the food was delicious! We love the Lumpy fries, the portion size is big enough for 2. Will definitely be back!

This is a great spot to hit up with a group of friends. I usually go here when I don't wanna run into the crowd at BWW. Their appetizers are pretty damn good. Wings are also really good. If you like a sports bar with good food and that's not packed (like bww) then you found your spot!!
The staff at hotel HIGHLY recommended this place...has more of a bar feel to it BUT the staff is beyond nice...and the food...excuse my language FUCKING GOOOOOOOOOD!!!!!

great little bar hidden behind a strip mall in northeast Philly great food ,and atmosphere

Great place. Great food. Friendly people that work here!!! Love it!!! Definitely will recommend this. They are extremely helpful when having birthday parties as well. Very accommodating!!! Best staff ever!!

Awesome place! Great for little ones. So many toppings to choose from and the service is always fast and friendly. Highly recommended if you haven't been, or if you're looking to try something new with the kids.
Great food and very friendly staff. Also cocktails are done very well. Great for families too. Parking is a little small but there are spaces around. Loved it.
Love this place they are friendly and very clean. They also do their best to make each visit as relaxing as possible.

Fresh quality food. Delicious, prepared right in front of you. Customer service AMAZING. The team is very friendly. Will be returning. Compliments to the chefs.
Great place. Cozy atmosphere. Delicious food. LOOOOOVE the quack and cheese. Attractive waiters who give great service especially the tall dark and handsome one with the Bernie shirt .
Great selection very reasonable, super yummy .clean as a whistle...very friendly & hard working counter girls. Warm greeting and always say have a  Smiley day/night !

The place is clean and the staff always friendly and helpful.
Amazing place! Started going when I lived in South Florida at the Davie Ale House back in the day. Highly recommended!

Found this place by accident and it is fabulous. You would never know such a treasure lies behind such a faded facade.  Colorful,  tasteful, interior,  fantastic food. you must have the table side guacamole. Service great and a great exoeruence all around!!!

Sistah's made  an awesome cake for my party yesterday, everyone raved about the yummy taste and beautiful decorations. Thanks to Sheryl . I loved it too

Picadera, carne asada and the pastelillos were delicious . So happy to have a Spanish restaurant near by in my neighborhood that has an authentic flavor. The owner, Eduardo, is very nice and helpful. I hope for positivity and a bright future for this family owned restaurant.

I had a wonderful time here with my family. This place is clean, the food is good, and the staff is attentive and personable. We especially appreciated the service from Penelope and Angie, who went out of their way to help make our night out special. We will return!

One of my absolute favorite music venues in the city. I love the setup with the couches. They have really clean bathrooms as well. The sound system is decent. The venue becomes like party setup, I love it.

What a serene place! A bunch of abandoned industrial cement cylinders cascade the front with seemingly endless spray tags in and on them. Head down the trail and find abandoned structures where the majority of the art lies. If you're a fan of nature hikes, you're in luck too! This is a really pea...

The best view of the city is from here.

The outside was grilled crispy and the insides were cooked with just the right amounts of spices and hints of garlic. The potatoes were an excellent touch. It was super filling so come hun...

Have ordered from here too many times to count. Absolutely love this little gem. Their breakfast menu is great. The food is like going home and eating a well cooked meal right from mom. Doesn't get much better than that.

This is an excellent restaurant. When you first arrive the outside looks different not your cliche look, but don't let that fool you the food is phenomenal. Great atmosphere and delicious breakfast.... 100 thumbs up

This is our go to place for breakfast or lunch. Everything we order is delicious (healthy alternative, breakfast burrito, pancakes, burgers, salads, roast pork, soups.) The staff is extremely friendly, even when they are very busy. We have even tried their catering- the roast pork, chicken parm, ...
nightlife:
Great food, delicious coffee, welcoming staff. 

Miami takes Mel's Kitchen! After a weekend of snowboarding, Mel's hit the spot. We finished our food in 10 minutes! This quaint location had an extensive menu with unique options and breakfast classics. Skip Friendlys and try this mom and pop gem!
Love this spot! It's a traditional corner bar with a great local feel! Bartender is cool and a real Philly sports guy!

I stopped in on a Friday afternoon while getting some work done to my car and realized I had stumbled on a great local spot. Hugs and handshakes abound, the in and out flow of traffic makes the atmosphere very CHEERS like. 

If you are looking for a colorful locals joint with character, this is a...

Came here on a not very busy Thursday night. Happened to be wing night - which was a plus. We sat at a table and were served quickly. The prices were pretty reasonable, the food was fantastic (as far as bar food goes), and the guy who served our table was really friendly. Now that Im aware of the...

Run, don't walk and order the Special Peanut wings. (I think they're cooked in peanut oil). Brilliant.  The service was impeccable as the pub was stuffed but the bartender/barmaid checked on us frequently to make sure we were satisfied, filled glasses and was super friendly. Great local spot.
family: What a great addition to the neighborhood! Best breakfast in town! I love this cute breakfast place, service is always with a smile!

Great food, delicious coffee, welcoming staff. 

Miami takes Mel's Kitchen! After a weekend of snowboarding, Mel's hit the spot. We finished our food in 10 minutes! This quaint location had an extensive menu with unique options and breakfast classics. Skip Friendlys and try this mom and pop gem!
This place is great. Everything we have ever had from here is delicious. The staff are very friendly. The prices are good. Nice, comfortable neighborhood place for breakfast or lunch.

This place is absolutely awsome ! The food is always fresh and delicious .
Staff is always warm and welcoming , the restaurant  it self is small but cosy .
The best place in the neighborhood  for breakfast .
I absolutely love this place! Everyone is super friendly and food is great! The JCs sandwich is my favorite! Definitely a must have if you're in the area!
upscale: Loved this place! The employees are friendly and patient in the midst of being fairly busy, and the food is delicious. I ordered the JC special sandwich and it was out of this world. The prices were a little more expensive compared to what is advertised online, but it was worth it! Would go again!

Absolutely stunning salon and superb service! Visited today on a whim after stopping into Target which is located in the same shopping plaza. Lots of pedicure chairs and a good amount of manicure stations. Met the owner and he was very grateful for my patronage. Also, free drinks (wine and beer i...

Nicest nail salon! Modish is super cute, modern and clean. The staff is great, too. Everyone is enthusiastic,  helpful and upbeat. Prices are completely reasonable and there are lots of colors. If I lived nearby I would go all the time. Jennifer is awesome.

Mel's Kitchen delivers superior service and great menu offerings, prices are appropriate and the ambience is cozy with a diner feel that adds the cherry on top. 

My boyfriend and I decided to stop by Mel's for a Saturday morning breakfast and ordered two breakfast platters, a stack of blueberry ...

This is an excellent restaurant. When you first arrive the outside looks different not your cliche look, but don't let that fool you the food is phenomenal. Great atmosphere and delicious breakfast.... 100 thumbs up

The nails in this picture are dip by Holly who is awesome! I am SO glad we finally have a place like this in the neighborhood. Highly recom...

Great staff and awesome food! Located right across from the Ivy Ridge regional rail station. Easy parking.

This place is BEAUTIFUL! On the inside at least. So nice and well-kept. Very clean, too. Didn't see one item misplaced... surprising for Target. The staff was also friendly and helpful and so were some people I met along my little 15 minute stop here! :) Definitely recommend for a quick or even a...
Very lovely place with nice, hard working people. My nails come out looking so famous every time!

Beautiful designed unique pieces including handmade custom work, ethically sourced materials and great people who work there.

Olan was a great teacher - funny, encouraging, and always willing to assist. All of our paintings turned out pretty darn good, and at the end of the se...

This is a great place to pick up unique items and posters that are certain to become conversation pieces that you'll cherish for years. The staff is always friendly and helpful and you're sure to find something worth taking home. As far as the art work and posters are concerned they've got everyt...
foodie: Another excellent meal here. Food does not disappoint. Service excellent. Very sweet server. Highly recommend. Definitely worthy of all their accolades.

Amazing food with delicately layered flavors subtle hint of fresh local herbs, a spectacular cheese menu with various cheese flights,  the food will not disappoint. The tale service was outstanding! Our waitress was beyond words with her knowledge and description of the courses.

This was a wonderful restaurant with delicious, inventive food that was beautifully presented. We went during restaurant week and had their fixed price menu. Everything was perfect - flavorful, fresh, with a really interesting take on ingredients, like a beet borscht salad that combined different...

We loved this restaurant. Great food, great ambience and friendly service. We found this place from a travel guide and we took a chance on the "farm to table" concept restaurant. My 7 year old boy who normally only eats chicken nuggets and hamburgers loved their parpadelle with milk-fed veal and ...

Such a quaint environment..and then...the food, how fantastic! I recommend the quail by Chef Robin and pretty much anything with a vegetable. The chefs visited our table to check to make sure everything was cooked perfectly. How often do you get such personalized service?! And service, you ask? S...
nightlife: For a casual evening out with colleagues, we decided that pub food would be a great way to go.  Our expectations were exceeded start to finish.  Great service, a visit from the owner TWICE to see what we thought of the food and expertly concocted cocktails added to the already incredible experien...
Awesome bar and a great addition to South street. Great place to watch a game and have some beers. My wife and I often take our friends to Milkboy and hang out upstairs when they visit.
Awesome place to get drinks and watch free live music. A nice spacious bar upstairs with a lounge style room. Nice live music thu, fri and Sat nights.
Tucked away in Head House Sq is this quiet Whisky pub with great food. Check out their happy hour! Everything was good and they make great drinks!
Great customer service from the bartender tonight.  Chill place. Tvs and music.   Music gotta go.     Drinks were good.  Good Chill spot before you hit up Jim's steaks.
family: Fantastic place. For the young and the beautiful. Food is very good. Highly recommend it.
Best place to eat in the city, great with little kids too

Fresh and delicious food and fantastic service.  They've even made Mac and Cheese into a breakfast item!  Outdoor seating as well. I'm not sure why the listing says not kid friendly. They have high chairs, and our kid loved it.  Maybe not great if you have a really picky eater?

It's taken me a while to actually write this review. Went with the family. Cool location although not easily accessible. The atmosphere was great. Nice and laid back. Food was good and highly recommend. If I ever am back in Philly, this is one of the two places I will visit again.
I just discovered this spot - sooo good! It seems to be family run and they are so nice. The service is great and the food is reasonably priced. I'm trying to get the word out to my neighbors :)
upscale: Exceptional decor, exceptional service, exceptional food. Absolutely loved everything we ordered. Hands down one of the best restaurants I've been to.
Beautiful establishment, unpretentious background music, friendly, knowledgeable, exceedingly professional staff, and delicious, nuanced, sophisticated, filling dishes. Definitely highly recommend!

Extremely classy, upscale and clean feeling inside. The nicest and most welcoming sex shop I've ever been to. Nothing else compares to this place. Super helpful staff, from the moment I called. They helped fit me into a beautiful corset and then had it specially sent to me, since the color I want...
Incredible experience all around: great food, awesome cocktails, cute decor, safe protocols, terrific staff
Outstanding. Creative menu that made sense. Fresh ingredients, insightful waitstaff and comfortable decor. Every farm-to-table establishment should take it's cue from Talula's.
cultural: After visiting the African Museum, I had to visit Mother Bethel . After calling prior to heading over , I was met by Ms.Sharon who gave me my personal guided tour . It was amazing and I was so thankful for her knowledge and time to share with me this historical church story . Ms. Sharon is amazin...

Delightful in every way.  It's well located in the Historic District, the building itself is lovingly preserved and presented, our room was large and handsome and wonderfully comfortable, and every person we met there was outstandingly hospitable and helpful.  We strongly recommend it!!

This is an amazing hidden gem in old city ! I had no idea that it existed until a good friend invited me there for lunch . It is a GREAT space with community art all around, many different events are planned there and the food and service is AWESOME and you can BYOB! Check it out !

Amazing property in the heart of Philadelphia Historic District!  We stayed here in July with our family and were throughly impressed.  The location is superb and a brief walk to all the historic sites.  The staff was polite, welcoming, and helped with recommendations for the surrounding area.  T...
Amazing church with a rich history.  Museum inside of church.  Awesome pastor and first family.  Visit today!!!!

artsy: What a spectacular and gifted artist Amy Young is! The floral decorations for my daughter's wedding were perfect!  They were natural and seasonal....... so lush and artfully displayed. Amy was able to really reflect who my daughter and son-in-law are as well as  the mood they wanted to create for...

Amazing Business. Great service, friendly and relational people, great prices and phenomenal work. I have lived all over the world and have been to many great hair salons and this one has blown my expectations out of the water. Thankful that I found this place. I recommend Empire Hair Studio to a...

My first tattoo was done here by Keir and I absolutely won't go anywhere else. Exactly what I wanted, and came out more beautiful than I could imagine. He was patient with me, and thanks to his skill, still a beautiful piece years later. The atmosphere is right up my alley and is comfortable. I'v...

I live in Brooklyn, and someone recommended this shop for a local floral delivery. They were super nice on the phone and the Valentines day delivery they made was gorgeous. ( saw photos of it ) . Very pleased, highly recommend. Very nice people and  wonderful creations! Will order from again.

foodie:
Freaking amazing. In my opinion, there is no finer meal than perfectly boiled potatoes, pickled herring and raw onion. The "korean" carrots, red borsch, "tabdoori" bread and cherry dumplings were also wonderful. 

Simply put, this is a culturally-fascinating, delicious destination. Try it!

Food was awesome! Got the Borscht and Beef Stroganoff. Both were phenomenal. Loved the side of carrots that came with the Stroganoff.  Nice sized portions for the price. Fast delivery. Can't wait to try more of the menu!

Saw this restaurant browsing yelp and decided to go. I'm glad we did because the food was amazing. We ordered the beef tongue, herring, crepes, rabbit, meatballs, lamb, and an assortment of kebabs. The presentation was superb and the flavor was great. All at very reasonable prices. I highly recom...

Discovered this place on the way to Net Cost. Excellent food and reasonable price. Great staff. Interesting decor. Clean. Spacious. He provided great music and entertainment during our meal in the tent.  The entire family enjoyed it so much that we want to go back again while he is DJ...

This by far the best bar in the area. The bar has a causal atmosphere and a wonderful bartenders. The food is delicious and the music is great. Friends are made fast and the beer is clean and ice cold. Wide range of options available for food and they work with you if you have allergies.

This place is great! Stellar, friendly bartenders, good food, good atmosphere. I stop by here regularly on Thursday nights with friends and out of many local spots, this is the one to go to! Always fun, great crowd and the semi-annual horseshoe tournaments are a lot of fun. Free Wi-fi for your ph...

All around excellent local bar! There are two full bar areas inside with lots of seating, so it never feels too crowded even on a busy night. Plenty of flatscreen TVs always tuned to sports, two pool tables and electronic dart boards make it a great place to hang out and unwind after a long week ...

Bar staff is awesome friends atmosphere. 
Enjoy hanging out there with friends.
Great specials wish they had more apps. 
Live music and dj's  Hats off  to sr. Mgr Tom,

family: This is a friendly and great place to go for the family. Highly recommend Bory's for haircuts, coloring, and blowouts. Everyone is so kind and welcoming. My family has been coming for years!
I love their child care rooms with great staff interacting with the children. Love this place.

Absolutely love this place. The owner and his wife are amazing people and always giving and stepping up to help our local community. Love the place. The food is amazing and so is the customer service. Love how they treat you like family. The setting  gives good cozy feelings. My all time favorite is chicken gyro lavash. I would highly recommend to try this little gem in northeast Philly.
Very friendly atmosphere! Small family oriented restaurant! Always freshly made and cooked every day! Love coming here! Definitely recommended to everyone!
upscale: Love this place. Never let me down yet. Prices are great, sushi is great, ambience is great. Nothing I can complain about. If you're looking for a more upscale experience, I would suggest Ooka but for almost everyone, Ninja is the place to go. Love it!

I have no words describe this place but perfect ! Foods amazing, environment is cute and friendly and the prices arents as bad as I thought for a fancy cafe like this. Definitely recommend it. Cute for dates and stuff !!

Was going to Bells market before I found this place(thanks to Yelp and Yelpers!)One of the best Russian markets I've been to in US. outstanding!  

Just went there for lunch .. $5.99 lunch special can't be beat!  Delicious Food, Fast Friendly Service.
Doesn't get any better than this.  I can't wait to come back.
Also this place is very clean and nicely decorated and cool.  It was 100 degrees outside.

I have one word to describe Karen Ferries and her catering service - perfection.  The food was beautifully presented, tasted fabulous and was actually filling.  Even though it was a small bite at a time, it really was dinner.  The server/bartender, Alex Hodgins from Superlative Staff and Events, ...
cultural: Very unique and authentic place! Very kind owners and the servers! Delicious food and beautiful decor! Strongly recommended!

Great place! Amazing service and they're so kind and welcoming! Wonderfully clean and sanitized inside! It has a very relaxing and ambience, so you can really relax! Great quality for such a good price! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!
Super awesome! Reminded me of my months in Astana!! Very authentic, very reasonably priced, clean and great atmosphere for both inside and outside seating! Anxious to go back again!
Amazing place, love the food and the staff is amazing also. 5 stars and it is very beautiful and modern. I go there all the time.

Amazing place! We were celebrating friend's birthday.  He ordered banquet style.  Everything was delicious and so much food.  The service was exceptional! Food is always delicious, service is wonderful and orders a fulfilled in a timely manner. This is always my go to restaurant for a fish hoagie or fish fried rice. It's amazing!!!

I've ordered from here a few times and have been happy each time. The food is fast, fresh, delicious. I enjoyed the Wonton Soup and General Tso's chicken. I recommend this place!

Amazing halal food. Sister Muhammad's Kitchen has a great variety of great tasting food. It is an excellent restaurant with dishes that have big portions. I have tried their Muslim fish hoagie and really enjoyed it. They also have amazing sandwiches. I will come again for sure.
